Growth Strategy — Kooner Mobile AutoCare

THE FUTURE OF AUTO CARE.
INDUSTRY POWERHOUSE.
HOUSEHOLD NAME.

Trust Centralized. Service Localized.

Kooner already built the machine. The consumer division runs on the same foundation — same infrastructure, same discipline, lighter fleet. We extend what exists. We don't rebuild it.

The core insight: Kooner already built the operational infrastructure — the dispatch model, the tech platform, the service standards, the supply chain. We extend that foundation into the consumer market. But make no mistake — automotive consumers have very different expectations and needs than fleet clients. This division is purpose-built to cater to them. White-glove. Zero friction. Trusted. Personal.

Kooner Mobile AutoCare
We come to you.
Always.
Your driveway. Your office. Your hotel. We handle the rest.
The cluster model — how we operate
Park once. Stay all day. Zero windshield time between jobs.
We target high-density, high-dwell zones — hospitals, campuses, airports, neighborhoods. The van parks. Customers come to us or we move driveway to driveway. Parts are preloaded by VIN the night before. Hood open at 8 AM. Auto-restock fires every evening. The cycle runs itself.
🔴
Broken
The Problem
Waiting rooms. Tow trucks. Scattered techs driving across thirty zip codes. The consumer deserves better — and nobody has fixed it yet.
🤝
Building Trust
The Experience
See the tech before they arrive. Approve every dollar. Pay from your phone. White-glove service — from the Nano Fleet to the Mega Fleet.
📈
Scaling
The Growth
Employer sponsored. Property sponsored. Subscriptions. Gifting. Low acquisition cost. Built to scale across every Kooner market nationwide.
Cluster Model
How We Operate
Park once. Stay all day. Zero windshield time between jobs. We go where cars sit for hours — and we don't leave until every one is done.
The problem we solve

Auto care has never worked around your life.
Until now.

The consumer deserves better. No waiting rooms. No tow trucks. No wasted hours. Kooner Mobile AutoCare is the answer the market has been waiting for.

🏢 The waiting room

2–4 hours of your day. Bad coffee. Upsells you didn't ask for. Nobody has time for this anymore — and they shouldn't have to.

🚛 The tow truck

$200–$600 to move a car that needs a battery or a tire. That money belongs in parts and labor — not a tow. We eliminate the tow truck entirely.

⏱️ Windshield time

Every minute a tech spends driving between scattered jobs is a minute not earning. Scattered dispatch kills margin. We cluster instead.

"We don't move you to the service — we move the service to you. You stay at work, at the hotel, on your couch. We handle the rest."

Services

What we do — and how we grow it

Low entry cost. High frequency. Focused, high-margin services that anchor every customer relationship and build unstoppable repeat business.

Phase 1 — Starting now
Oil changes are the anchor.
Every relationship starts here.
High frequency. Fast turnaround. The service that builds the zone.
Phase 1 — now

Oil and fluid service

The anchor. Every customer relationship starts here. High frequency, fast turnaround, builds the zone rhythm.

Phase 1 — now

Brakes and wear items

Pads, rotors, wipers, cabin filters, belts. Safety-critical. Strong repeat demand. The service that earns long-term trust.

Phase 1 — now

Battery and electrical — incl. starters

12V replacement, charging systems, and starter repair for all platforms including EV auxiliary systems.

Phase 1 — now

Emergency response — 24/7

No-start, flat tire, dead battery. On-site. No tow. No wait. Faster response and lower cost than any alternative.

Phase 1 — now

Diagnostics and inspection

Fast on-site diagnosis. Photos and plain language sent to the customer's phone before we touch anything.

Phase 2 — next

Programming and ECU

Module flashing on-site. Part married to the vehicle in the lot. No dealer visit required. Most mobile operators cannot do this.

Phase 2 — next

ADAS and sensor recalibration

Forward sensors back to OEM spec in the parking lot. Our technical edge over every competitor in the market.

Phase 2 — add-on

GPS and dash cam — stocked on van

Installed on-site as a natural upsell within the zone visit. Inventory carried and stocked on every van.

Phase 3 — EV

EV specialist services

Tesla, Rivian, emerging EV platforms — tires, thermal checks, 12V, HEPA filters. We build toward this as the market matures.

How it works

We park once. We stay. We finish.

Every decision in this model is about removing friction — for the customer and for the technician. Less driving. More wrenching. More trust. More revenue.

New revenue stream — 24/7 industrial

We work while the world sleeps. That's uncontested revenue.

Amazon fulfillment centers, hospitals, hotels, and casinos never close. The people who work and stay there drive their personal cars to work — and those cars sit in the lot for hours, sometimes overnight. While traditional auto care closes at 6 PM, we're changing oil, rotating tires, and servicing the personal vehicles of the people on shift. Nobody else is doing this.

Industrial — 24/7
Amazon, hospitals, casinos

The warehouse worker's Camry. The night shift nurse's Honda. The casino dealer's Accord. Personal vehicles sitting in employee lots overnight. We service them while their owners work. Done before the shift ends.

Hotels and resorts
While they sleep. While they gamble.

Guest checks in. Books Kooner through the hotel app or lobby QR code. We change their oil while they're at dinner, at the pool, or at the blackjack table. They wake up to a fully serviced car. They never had to think about it.

Residential — daytime
HOA and neighborhood zones

Residential service runs daytime per HOA regulations. Driveway to driveway. Short drives not miles. Neighbor referrals fill the schedule automatically.

Driveway to driveway
Keys back in hand. Car serviced. You never left your neighborhood.
Emergency response
24/7. On-site. No tow truck. We come to wherever you are.

🏥 Cluster zone — hospital, office park, airport, Amazon

We pull into the lot and set up. Cars come to us — we work stall to stall, floor to floor, without ever moving the van. One tech can service an entire hospital shift without driving a mile. Maximum density. Zero windshield time between jobs. This is where the 24/7 industrial model lives.

🏘️ Residential zone — HOA, neighborhood, apartment complex

We move driveway to driveway — short drives, not miles. The moment we arrive on a street, opted-in neighbors get a notification. One booking becomes five before we leave the street. Daytime scheduling keeps us compliant with HOA regulations and community standards.

Night before

Parts auto-generated

VIN bookings and AI stocking pull the exact parts list. Overnight delivery to the tech's driveway or drop box. Right part, right van, before departure. No warehouse run.

8:00 AM — or midnight

Hood open — first job

Tech goes direct to first customer. No warehouse stop. No depot detour. Every minute from the first job is billable. Industrial shifts start when the lot is ready.

Every evening — auto

Overnight restock fires automatically

Portal reads parts used, AI triggers tomorrow's overnight delivery. The cycle resets itself. No dispatcher. No phone call. The system runs itself.

The fleet

We serve everyone — from one car to one thousand

Four fleet tiers. One platform. The same white-glove experience whether you're a mom-in-law who can't change her own oil or a hospital system with a parking lot full of employee vehicles.

Nano fleet 👤

One car.
Fully taken care of.

1 vehicle

One car. One person. Fully taken care of. The senior who shouldn't be driving to a shop. The college student whose dad is worried about the car. They deserve the same white-glove service as the biggest account we have.

Senior · Solo driver · Student away at school
Micro fleet 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦

The family.
One garage account.

2–10 vehicles

Dad's truck in the driveway. Mom's SUV. Teenager learning to drive. Kid at UCSD. Kid at SDSU. Grandma down the street. All managed in one garage. All VINs tracked. All services logged. One trusted mechanic for the whole family.

Family · Household · Extended family · Small HOA group
Mid fleet 🏢

Local business.
Managed like enterprise.

10–100 vehicles

Local doctor's office. Law firm employee lot. Regional rental car agency. Small contractor with a fleet of work trucks. They get the same platform, the same service standards, and the same experience as the biggest accounts — at the right scale.

Doctor's office · Law firm · Rental agency · Contractor fleet
Mega fleet 🏗️

Enterprise level.
24/7 capability.

100+ vehicles

Hospital system. Amazon fulfillment center. Pechanga Resort. Apple campus. Corporate HR enrolls in bulk. Pre-paid credit wallets. Site manager dashboard. Overnight industrial service available. One contract covers the entire operation.

Hospitals · Amazon · Hotels · Casinos · Corporate campuses
🎖️
Military Fleet — Special program
We serve the people who serve us.

Camp Pendleton — 40,000+ active duty. Naval Base San Diego — 20,000+ sailors. MCAS Miramar — Marines. Thousands of personal vehicles parked on base and in surrounding communities every single day. High density. High dwell time. And a community that talks. We partner with base family support offices to offer discounted service programs for active duty and veterans. A Kooner Mobile AutoCare military discount is not charity — it is smart business in one of the densest, most loyal customer clusters in Southern California.

Camp Pendleton Naval Base San Diego MCAS Miramar Oceanside · Temecula · San Diego Military discount program Base family support partnership

From the family Micro Fleet to the hospital Mega Fleet — every customer gets the same trusted experience.
One platform. One standard. One Kooner.

High-density zones

We go where people park for hours, not minutes

High density. High dwell time. Real employers. Real on-site headcounts. This is where the revenue is — and nobody else is showing up with a plan.

Industrial campuses — employee personal vehicles, 24/7

The Amazon warehouse worker, the night shift hospital tech, the casino dealer — they park their personal cars for 8, 10, 12 hours at a stretch. We service those cars while their owners are on the clock. They clock out to a fresh oil change. Nobody else is doing this overnight.

Acquisition and marketing

How we get in — and how we scale cheap

Every zone has its own acquisition program. Sales closes remotely. The cluster fills itself. Customer acquisition cost goes down as density goes up.

Hotels and resorts

Amenity Upgrade Program

Oil change while you vacation

Property offers Kooner at check-in alongside spa and valet. Guest books from the room. We service overnight or while they dine. Zero friction for the property. Premium value for the guest.

Business parks and offices

Safety Check Week

Oil Change Wednesdays

One deal with the property manager covers every tenant. Rotating weekly programs keep demand consistent. One remote sale, dozens of companies, hundreds of employees.

Apartments and HOAs

Resident Care Days

Oil Change Saturdays · Spring prep · Winter prep · Wiper blade day

Complex management sponsors as a resident retention tool. Seasonal hooks fill the schedule year-round. Closed remotely. Zero overhead to acquire.

Neighborhoods and driveways

Neighbor-on-Neighbor

Auto notification · Earn credits · Employee rewards

Arrive on a street, opted-in neighbors get a notification. Refer a neighbor, earn a credit. Every service automatically sells the next one.

The van is the marketing.
Every zone visit is a brand impression. Every neighbor sees us work. Every satisfied customer tells the next one.
Three ways the money flows
Revenue stream 1

🏢 Employer sponsored

The hospital, the tech campus, the law firm — they sponsor Kooner Mobile AutoCare as an employee benefit. HR offers it alongside gym membership and dental. The employer pays a sponsorship fee or per-vehicle rate. The employee gets a discounted or covered service. The employer gets retention, productivity, and a premium perk at a fraction of the cost of a raise. We arrive to a full lot before we send a single notification.

Revenue stream 2

🏘️ Property sponsored

The apartment complex, the HOA, the hotel — they sponsor the event as a resident or guest amenity. The property receives a revenue share from every service completed in their lot that day. They promote it to residents and guests because it makes them money and builds loyalty. We get the lot, the built-in audience, and zero marketing spend. The property pays for its own customer acquisition.

Revenue stream 3

👤 End customer pays

Standard booking. No sponsorship required. The customer books through the app, approves the work, and pays via QR or tap. Even at full price, our cluster model keeps our cost to serve so low that we price competitively and win on margin every time. The Nano Fleet customer pays the same rate as the Mega Fleet hospital employee — and gets the same experience.

Employee rewards and referral programs
Employee rewards

🎁 The company takes care of your car

Employers enroll their team in the Kooner Mobile AutoCare program as a workplace benefit. Employees book through the platform on company credit. Top referrers earn free service credits. HR promotes it as a retention and wellness tool — "we take care of your car so you can focus on your work." We show up to a full employee lot we didn't have to sell one person at a time.

Referral program

📲 Every service sells the next one

Refer a coworker — earn a wiper blade day. Refer a neighbor — earn a service credit. The moment we enter a zone, opted-in customers get a notification: "We're at your neighbor's house. Tap to add your car and we'll zip right over." Downtime in the schedule fills itself before the tech notices the gap. The zone becomes self-sustaining.

Subscriptions · Rewards · Gifting
Subscription plans

📦 Prepay. Show up when ready.

Six-pack oil change subscription. Tire rotation bundle. Family plan covering every VIN in the garage. Corporate block — HR buys a set of services for the whole team. Locked-in pricing. No scheduling anxiety. No expiration pressure. The customer books when it works for them and we show up.

Employee rewards

🏆 Win a set of tires. Earn free brakes.

Companies reward top performers with Kooner credits — free oil changes, free brake inspections, free tire rotations. Corporate events and sponsorships give away six-month oil change packages. Safety check milestones earn a free wiper blade day. The employer keeps their team's cars safe and their people loyal. We show up to a full lot before we send a single ping.

Gifting

🎁 Give the gift of a trusted mechanic.

Gift an oil change for a birthday, holiday, or corporate thank-you. QR code gift cards scannable directly at the van or redeemable in the app. Send one to a college student, an aging parent, a new neighbor. Nobody else is doing this. "Give the gift of a trusted mechanic" is a category nobody owns yet — and we get there first.

How we scale at low cost

More wrench time. Less windshield time.
That is how customer acquisition cost goes down.

Traditional mobile operators chase customers across zip codes. We build density inside zones. The zone does the selling. Our salespeople close accounts from their phones. Our techs never leave the cluster. Lower cost to acquire. Lower cost to serve. Higher margin per zone day.

Zero
Cold calls needed to fill a zone day
1 deal
With a property manager = hundreds of customers
Auto
Neighbor pings fire when we enter a zone
Phone
Sales team closes accounts remotely — zero windshield time selling

The pings go out automatically.
Every opted-in customer within range gets a notification instantly

Auto-fill
Schedule gaps fill themselves before the tech notices downtime
Zero cost
No ad spend. No cold calls. The zone does the selling automatically
🏷️ Cluster tagging

The zone fills itself

Every customer is tagged to their cluster. When we enter a zone we ping tagged customers automatically — "We're at your neighbor's house. Tap to add your car." Downtime becomes revenue. Every gap in the schedule fills itself before the tech notices it.

📱 Remote sales

Close from the phone

Apartment complexes, hotel properties, corporate campuses, and HOA boards are all closeable remotely. Our outside sales team pitches and closes by phone. One on-site visit for the final handshake if needed. Zero windshield time wasted on selling.

🔄 Retention engine

Predictive maintenance keeps them coming back

The platform tells customers what's coming before the light comes on. Seasonal promotions push automatically — spring prep, winter prep, wiper blade day. Every touchpoint is a reason to rebook. Retention is built into the product.

The platform

From your couch to a serviced car — zero friction

One platform. One experience. The Nano Fleet and the Mega Fleet hospital feel exactly the same. White-glove service is not a premium — it is the standard.

One platform. One experience.
Everyone feels like a big account.

The garage knows your car. Predictive maintenance tells you what's coming before the light comes on. Promotions appear when they're relevant. The service advisor manages your entire experience virtually. You never have to wonder, wait, or worry.

Nano — one car, fully taken care of Micro — family garage, all VINs Mid — local business fleet Mega — enterprise, 24/7 capable Rental — Avis, Budget, Enterprise Gig — Uber, Lyft, DoorDash Campus — Apple, Google, Qualcomm Student and teacher program
Zero friction — six moments that build trust

The experience that turns one booking into a lifetime

Every moment is designed to remove friction and replace it with trust. The customer never has to try hard.

📹
Tech intro video

30-second clip before arrival. Name, face, certifications. The customer knows exactly who is coming before they knock.

📍
Live GPS tracking

Watch the mechanic move toward you on the map. Exact ETA. No guessing, no waiting, no wondering.

💬
Live chat and text

Three-way communication — tech, service advisor, and customer. Approve additional work with one tap. No phone calls. Ever.

📋
Digital health report

Before and after photos of every service item. Plain language — no shop-speak. Full car history in the customer's pocket forever.

🔍
Predictive maintenance

The system tracks every VIN in the garage and tells the customer what's coming before the light comes on. No surprises.

💳
QR or tap to pay

Scan the QR code on the van or tap in the app. The mechanic never handles payment. Clean, professional, fully tracked.

Built on what Kooner already has
Powered by FleetIQ™ — Kooner's proprietary fleet intelligence platform

The consumer division runs on the same operational foundation as the fleet business. Same dispatch model, same service standards, same tech infrastructure — pointed at the consumer market.

FleetIQ™ dispatch logic Parts procurement system Technician training standards 24/7 roadside infrastructure 26-state operational footprint
Talent

We build the technicians we need

A clear path from day one to the top of the trade. Real earning potential at every level. Recruiting pipelines that go where competitors don't look.

The industry has a talent problem. We solve it by creating a career ladder that makes Kooner Mobile AutoCare the best place to grow as a technician — not just the next job. Every tech has a path. Every path has a number. Every number grows with the zone.

1
Entry level — Technical helper

Recruited for attitude and reliability. Assists on jobs, learns the service menu, gets certified on Kooner standards. The pipeline starts here and the career path is clear from day one.

Starting range — competitive hourly
2
Core technician

Handles all Phase 1 services independently — oil, brakes, battery, electrical, diagnostics, and emergency response. The revenue engine of every cluster zone. Performance bonuses tied directly to zone output.

Mid range — performance bonus eligible
3
Systems specialist

Programming, ADAS calibration, GPS and dash cam installation, complex diagnostics. The technical capability that separates Kooner from every other mobile operator in the market. Specialist premium on top of base pay.

Upper range — specialist premium pay
4
EV master technician

High-voltage systems, thermal management, and full EV diagnostics for Tesla, Rivian, and emerging platforms. The future of the service offering — built now, deployed as the market demands it. The highest paid role in the organization.

Top range — EV premium + zone bonuses
UTI

Universal Technical Institute — early-hire agreements

LT

Lincoln Tech — certified graduates, day one ready

DOD

SkillBridge — Camp Pendleton · NASB · Miramar — separating mechanics at SoCal bases, often at no cost

CC

City college partnerships — curriculum embedded, pipeline owned

D/M

Diesel and marine crossovers — transferable skills, disciplined workers

REF

Internal referral bonuses — techs vouch for who they bring in

Community

Giving back to the people who give the most

Small, warm, and community-driven. A values statement — not a growth strategy. The brand that shows up for the neighborhood.

Kooner Care Grant

Nominations through VFW chapters, senior centers, fire stations, and local churches. No bureaucracy. No politics. Just a car that works for someone who earned it — funded by the people who use us every day.

🇺🇸 Veterans 🎖️ Active duty military 🤝 Seniors 🚒 First responders

Southern California is home to some of the largest military installations in the world. Camp Pendleton. Naval Base San Diego. MCAS Miramar. We partner with base family support programs to deliver discounted service directly to the men and women who serve — at the gate, in base housing, and in the surrounding communities of Oceanside, San Diego, and Temecula.

This is the future of auto care.

Trust Centralized. Service Localized.

From the family Micro Fleet to the hospital Mega Fleet — every personal vehicle, every customer, every time. Zero friction. Zero compromise.

Ready to build this together.
